title: grewia bicolor var. tephrodermis
intro: Grewia bicolor var. tephrodermis, also known as the Grewia bicolor tephrodermis, is a variant of the Grewia bicolor plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Grewia bicolor var. tephrodermis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and prevent cancer. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion by brewing its leaves or roots in hot water, or by making a tincture or ointment from its extracts for various herbal preparations.
